name: Roadzen Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Roadzen Inc. is a leading Insurtech company on a mission to transform global auto insurance powered by advanced artificial intelligence (AI). At the heart of our mission is our commitment to create transparency, efficiency, and a seamless experience for the millions of end customers who use our products through our insurer, OEM, and fleet (such as trucking, delivery, and commercial fleets) partners. We seek to accomplish this by combining computer vision, telematics and AI with...
